errors.TIME_INVALID: End time must be after start time
errors.MAINTENANCE_MODE: System is under maintenance, booking is currently disabled
errors.OUT_OF_HOURS: Booking is only allowed between {startHourLimit}:00 and {endHourLimit}:00
errors.MAX_BOOKINGS_EXCEEDED: A student can only create up to {maxBookings} bookings per day
errors.ROOM_CONFLICT: The Lab Room is already booked during this time
errors.EQUIPMENT_UNAVAILABLE: Equipment is in {status} status and cannot be booked
errors.EQUIPMENT_CONFLICT: The Equipment is already booked during this time
errors.UNAUTHORIZED_CANCEL: You are not authorized to cancel this booking
errors.INVALID_STATUS_CANCEL: Cannot cancel the booking in its current status
errors.BUFFER_TIME_REQUIRED: At least {buffer} minutes buffer time is required between bookings for cleanup
errors.BLACKLISTED: Your account has been locked. Reason: {reason}
